fields.helpText: Enter the name of the Vista Room-bed which requires translation.   Translation may be necessary if Room-Bed does not meet the Accu-Max criteria.  Room limited from 1-5 characters, Bed limited to 1-2 characters.  For example, Vista Room-Bed name "WYC200-100" would require translation because the Room is 6 characters and the Bed is 3 characters.
Name of the Room-Bed which will be on the Accu-Max system representing this Vista Room-Bed.  For example, "YC200-10".  Must be in the format RRRRR-BB where R = Room and B = Bed.
